description: _last_prices and _last_update_time dicts grow forever — entries never removed when positions close
resolution_notes: Added cleanup in _close_position() — removes entries when no more positions use that token_id

description: No PRAGMA busy_timeout — under load, SQLite returns SQLITE_BUSY causing unhandled crashes
resolution_notes: Added PRAGMA busy_timeout=5000 and PRAGMA synchronous=NORMAL in init_db()

description: No indexes on surges.timestamp, trends.timestamp, tracked_tokens.token_id, trades.exit_time — purge and queries do full table scans
resolution_notes: Added 6 indexes in init_db() via CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS
